title: Black Widow / Brown Recluse Spider Bite
immediate_steps: Wash the bite area with soap and water
Apply a cold compress or ice pack (wrapped in cloth) to reduce pain and swelling
Keep the bitten area elevated to heart level
Seek medical attention immediately (antivenom may be needed)
avoid: Do not attempt to suck out the venom

title: Tick Removal
immediate_steps: Use fine-tipped tweezers to grasp the tick as close to the skin's surface as possible
Pull upward with steady, even pressure
After removing, thoroughly clean the bite area and your hands with rubbing alcohol or soap and water
Dispose of the tick by flushing it or putting it in alcohol
avoid: Do not twist or jerk the tick (the mouthparts can break off in the skin)
Do not use a hot match, nail polish, or petroleum jelly to smother it
